name: aws-agents
description: Build, deploy, and operate AI agents on AWS. Skills for scaffolding agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, connecting tools, memory, policies, evaluation, debugging, and production hardening.

interface.shortDescription: Build, deploy, and operate AI agents on AWS.
interface.longDescription: Complete developer workflow for building AI agents on AWS — scaffolding with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, tool integration, memory, policies, evaluation, debugging, VPC networking, and production hardening.
